query: SELECT sl.lock_week, wo.status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM schedule_locks sl LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON sl.work_order_number = wo.work_order_number WHERE sl.lock_week = '2026-02-23' GROUP BY sl.lock_week, wo.status ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute SELECT sl.lock_week, wo.status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM schedule_locks sl LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON sl.work_order_number = wo.work_order_number WHERE sl.lock_week = '2026-02-23' GROUP BY sl.lock_week, wo.status ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
